label: Creep joiner base
description: Abstract base for all creep joiner choice Defs (benefits, downsides, aggressives, rejections). Marked abstractType so it is not offered as a concrete create target.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight used by CreepJoinerUtility.GetRandom when choosing a random creep joiner option.

minCombatPoints.label: Min combat points
minCombatPoints.description: Minimum raid threat-point threshold required before this Def can be randomly selected.

canOccurRandomly.label: Can occur randomly
canOccurRandomly.description: When false, excludes this Def from random selection while still allowing explicit selection.

excludes.label: Excludes
excludes.description: Blacklists compatible CreepJoiner choices after this Def is selected. References any concrete CreepJoinerBaseDef subtype (benefit, downside, aggressive, or rejection).

requires.label: Requires
requires.description: Whitelists compatible CreepJoiner choices after this Def is selected. References any concrete CreepJoinerBaseDef subtype (benefit, downside, aggressive, or rejection).

surgicalInspectionLetterExtra.label: Surgical inspection letter extra
surgicalInspectionLetterExtra.description: Extra formatted text revealed by surgical inspection. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.
